questions.statement:
<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->Which figure should replace the question mark (?) if the following figure series were to be continued?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/08/F4_Savita_SSC_06-08-24_D1.png" style="width: 397px; height: 82px;" /></p>
If 15 August 2006 is a Tuesday, then what will the day of the week on 19 February 2012?

<p>What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?</p>

<p>4, 20, 100, 500, 2500, ?</p>
If 6 May 2005 is a Friday, then what will the day of the week on 25 September 2018?
If the year is NOT a leap year, then how is the last day of the year and first day of the same year related?
options: First day is Sunday, last day is Friday /
First day is Sunday, last day is Saturday /
First day is Tuesday, last day is Saturday /

questions.statement: <!-- x-tinymce/html -->In a certain language, &#39;this is music&#39; is written as &#39;Ta Bu Ka&#39; and &#39;who touched this&#39; is written as &#39;Pi Ka Bi&#39;. How is &#39;this&#39; written in the given language?

<p>Select the option that is related to the third number in the same way as the second number is related to the first number and the sixth number is related to the fifth number.</p>

<p>64 : 512 :: 169 : ? :: 225 : 3375</p>

<p>Select the combination of letters that when sequentially placed in the blanks of the given series will logically complete the series.</p>

<p>A _ A _ C A B _ B _ A _ _ B C A B A _ C</p>

In a certain code language, &#39;strong and mighty&#39; is written as &#39;ui yv tk&#39; and &#39;soft yet strong&#39; is written as &#39;hd tk bw&#39;. How is &#39;strong&#39; written in the given language?

<p>Select the correct mirror image of the given combination when the mirror is placed at MN as shown below.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/25/04/Task%20Id%201298%20%28Part%20II%29%20236.png" style="width: 200px; height: 241px;" /></p>

<p>If &lsquo;Z&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo;, &lsquo;Q&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&times;&rsquo;, &lsquo;H&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;+&rsquo; and &lsquo;E&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&ndash;&rsquo;, what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?</p>

<p>17 H 23 Q 42 Z 7 E 13 = ?</p>

<p>If &lsquo;U&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&divide;&rsquo;, &lsquo;D&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&times;&rsquo;, &lsquo;B&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;+&rsquo; and &lsquo;T&rsquo; stands for &lsquo;&ndash;&rsquo;, what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?</p>

<p>13 T 26 U 13 D 24 B 7 = ?</p>

<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->What should come in place of? in the given series based on the English alphabetical order?</p>

<p>CKS LRC ? DFW MMG</p>
How many meaningful English words can be formed with letters CKIK, using each letter only once in each word?

<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->What would be the symbol on the opposite side of &#39;@&#39; if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/12/F1_Savita_SSC_12-12-24_D58.png" style="width: 108px; height: 143px;" /></p>

<p>What would be the letter on the opposite side of &#39;Y&#39; if the given sheet is folded to form a cube?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/08/F1_Savita_SSC_06-08-24_D10.png" style="width: 77px; height: 188px;" /></p>

<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->What will come in the place of &#39;?&#39; in the following equation, if &#39;+&#39; and &#39;-&#39; are interchanged and &#39;&times;&#39;&nbsp;and &#39;&divide;&#39;&nbsp;are interchanged?</p>

<p>14 + 6 &times; 3 &divide; 7 - 2 = ?</p>

<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->What will come in the place of the question mark (?) in the following equation, if &#39;+&#39; and &#39;-&#39; are interchanged and &#39;&times;&#39; and &#39;&divide;&#39;&nbsp;are interchanged?</p>

<p>209 &divide; 2 + 14 - 120 &times; 3 = ?</p>
If 15 December 2006 is a Friday, then what will the day of the week on 13 October 2009?

<p>Select the correct mirror image of the given combination when the mirror is placed at MN as shown below.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/25/04/IMG%20-%201298%20%20%20%2023-04-25%20%20%20%20Yuvraj%20kori%20%20112.png" style="width: 200px; height: 200px;" /></p>

<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->What will come in the place of &#39;?&#39; in the following equation, if &lsquo;&times;&#39; and &#39;&divide;&#39; are interchanged?</p>

<p>18 - 2 + 12 &times; 4 &divide; 7 = ?</p>

options: M is the daughter of O /
M is the mother of O /
M is the father of O /
M is the brother of O /
